description: Utility dialect that photographs an existing item: given its item id, it renders that item's form view (resolving the task id and language from the item id), crops to a fixed aspect, uploads the PNG to an item-derived Storage path, and returns the image URL. Used to generate thumbnails; not a content-authoring target.

example_prompts.prompt: Capture a thumbnail of item item123.
example_prompts.notes: Simplest snap: snap item "item123" {}.. — renders the item's form view and uploads the PNG.
Adds the `width` modifier: snap width 240 item "item123" {}.. — height follows the crop aspect.

example_prompts.prompt: Snapshot item item123, just the top 800×600.
example_prompts.notes: Adds the `crop` modifier: snap crop { x: 0 y: 0 width: 800 height: 600 } item "item123" {}..
